summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aetheris Admin Control Nexus - all 6 master panels + hidden Dimensional Console. All backend APIs (10 endpoints) and frontend UI components working correctly. Admin authentication, dashboard navigation, data visualization, and ontology modification all functional.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/login - correct credentials returns token with role=admin
Backend: POST /api/admin/login - wrong email returns 401
Backend: POST /api/admin/login - wrong password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/me - without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - returns all required fields (users, designs, products, chats, sessions, files, categories, ontology counts)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - returns user list with enriched data (design_count, chat_count)
Backend: GET /api/admin/designs - returns design list with configuration
Backend: GET /api/admin/chat-history - returns chat list
Backend: GET /api/admin/chat-history - respects limit parameter
Backend: GET /api/admin/activity - returns admin_actions and user_tracking
Backend: GET /api/admin/ontology - returns full ontology structure (shapes, materials, colors, constraints, sustainability_vectors, dimensional_extensions)
Backend: GET /api/admin/security-logs - returns admin_logins, data_deletions, active_sessions, rate_limit_config, security_headers, compliance
Backend: GET /api/admin/system-health - returns CPU, memory, disk, DB metrics with operational status
Backend: POST /api/admin/ontology/update - add shape works
Backend: POST /api/admin/ontology/update - remove shape works
Backend: POST /api/admin/ontology/update - add material works
Backend: POST /api/admin/ontology/update - add color with hex works
Backend: POST /api/admin/ontology/update - invalid field returns 400
Backend: POST /api/admin/ontology/update - without token returns 401
Frontend: Admin login page renders at /admin with email/password form
Frontend: Admin login with correct credentials shows dashboard
Frontend: Admin login with wrong credentials shows error toast
Frontend: Panel 1 System Overview - stat cards, system health metrics, ontology summary, categories, dimensional extensions, recent designs/chats tables
Frontend: Panel 2 User Intelligence - user engagement bar chart (recharts), all users table with name/email/designs/chats/joined
Frontend: Panel 3 Design & Products - category distribution pie chart, all designs table with shape/color/material/version
Frontend: Panel 4 AI Agent Control - 5 agent mode status cards (Design/Material/Style/Spatial/Generative), conversation flow area chart, recent conversations
Frontend: Panel 5 Spatial Analytics - shape primitives, material library, color palette swatches, dimensional extensions, sustainability vectors, constraint framework
Frontend: Panel 6 Security & Compliance - compliance status cards (GDPR/CCPA/WCAG/Cookie), security headers, rate limiting config, admin login history, active sessions
Frontend: Tab navigation between all 6 panels works correctly
Frontend: Dimensional Console opens via button, shows live ontology state
Frontend: Dimensional Console allows adding/removing shapes/materials/colors/extensions
Frontend: Admin logout works and returns to login screen
Frontend: Admin refresh button fetches updated data

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components and interactions working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard fully tested. All 6 panels working: System Overview, User Intelligence, Design & Products, AI Agent Control, Spatial Analytics, Security & Compliance. Dimensional Console (hidden Super-Admin) accessible via Ctrl+Shift+D or sidebar button. Ontology was modified during testing - 'sphere' shape was previously added, 'test_cone' and 'test_prism' were added/removed during tests. Charts use recharts library (BarChart, PieChart, AreaChart).
